_comment: 3B-specific router config. profile_mean_r2=0.501 comes from experiments/compute_logit_linearity.py on Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct. With 0.501 < 0.55, alta_globally_viable=False so the scale-aware shortcut is DISABLED. Use this to measure how much of the 3B TruthfulQA gain comes from the shortcut vs. Gates 2/4. All other thresholds identical to router_thresholds.json.
